vips.title: VIP Privileges

rules.title: Rules Explanation
rules.item1: Upgrade Criteria: Meet the upgrade requirement (recharge or valid bet), and you will advance to the corresponding VIP level and receive the upgrade bonus. If multiple levels are upgraded continuously, all bonuses can be claimed after 00:00:00 today.
rules.item2: Daily Salary: Meet the daily recharge and valid bet requirements to receive the daily salary bonus. Only the current level’s daily salary is given. Unclaimed rewards expire daily.
rules.item3: Weekly Salary: Meet the weekly recharge and valid bet requirements to receive the weekly salary bonus. Only the current level’s weekly salary is given. Rewards expire if not claimed within the week.
rules.item4: Monthly Salary: Meet the monthly recharge and valid bet requirements to receive the monthly salary bonus. Rewards expire if not claimed within the month.
rules.item5: Expiration: Expired rewards will be voided. Please claim before the countdown ends.
rules.item6: Audit: VIP bonuses require 1× turnover before withdrawal. Any game provider is allowed.
rules.item7: Activity Statement: Only normal gaming behavior is allowed. Account renting, risk-free betting, arbitrage, bots, exploiting APIs or vulnerabilities, or any technical manipulation is strictly prohibited. If verified, the platform may suspend access and confiscate bonuses and illegal gains without prior notice.

rules.title: Commission Explanation:
rules.r1:
Calculation of A's performance:
(1) Claiming: A’s direct downlines include B1, B2, B3, and also indirect downlines such as C1, C2, and C3.
(2) A's daily direct performance = B1 + B2 + B3 direct bets = 500 + 3000 + 2000 = 5500.
(3) Direct commission = direct performance × commission rate = 5500 × 10% = 550.
(4) Other commission from C1, C2, C3, and B1’s direct downline: (1000+2000+2000+1000+2000) × 10% × 3% = 690.
(5) Total commission for A = 550 + 690 = 1240.
rules.r2:
Calculation of B1’s performance (downline commission 0.1%):
(1) Direct downlines: C1, C2, C3.
(2) Direct performance: 1000 + 2000 + 2000 = 5000.
(3) Direct commission = 5000 × 10% = 500.
(4) Total commission = 500.
rules.r3:
Calculation of B2’s performance:
(1) Direct downlines: D1, D2, D3.
(2) Direct performance: 1000 + 2000 + 3000 = 6000.
(3) Direct commission = 6000 × 10% = 600.
(4) Total commission = 600.
rules.r4:
Calculation of B3’s performance:
(1) Direct downlines: E1, E2, E3, plus indirect F1, C2, C3.
(2) Direct performance: 1000 + 2000 + 2000 = 5000.
(3) Direct commission = 5000 × 10% = 500.
(4) Total commission = 500.
rules.r5: Note: Commission is settled daily. All commissions from the day — direct and indirect — are calculated instantly and credited on the same day. For clarity, only daily commission is shown in the examples.

how.title: How It Works
how.step1: Upgrade criteria: meet the VIP upgrade requirement (top-up or valid bets), and you can upgrade and receive the upgrade bonus. If you upgrade multiple levels in a row, you can claim all bonuses after 00:00:00.
how.step2: Daily Salary: meet the daily requirement to receive the daily bonus. Unclaimed bonuses expire the same day.
how.step3: Weekly Salary: meet the weekly requirement to receive the bonus. Unclaimed bonuses expire weekly.
how.step4: Monthly Salary: meet the monthly requirement to receive the bonus. Unclaimed bonuses expire monthly.
how.step5: Expiration: expired bonuses are void. Claim before the countdown ends.
how.step6: Audit: bonuses require 1× turnover before withdrawal.
how.step7: Statement: Only normal gameplay is allowed. Account rental, risk-free betting, botting, exploiting API/vulnerabilities, etc. are prohibited. Violators may have bonuses and profits confiscated without notice.

agreement.title: User Agreement
agreement.section1: By registering and using this platform, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and fully agreed to all the terms and conditions outlined in this User Agreement, including any future updates published by the platform. If you do not agree with any part of this Agreement, you must immediately stop using the platform and all related services.
agreement.section2: You confirm that all information submitted during registration, including your name, contact details, banking information, payment details, and identity documents, is accurate, truthful, and belongs to you. If any information is found to be false, misleading, or illegally obtained, the platform reserves the right to restrict, freeze, or terminate your account without prior notice.
agreement.section3: Your account is for personal use only and must not be rented, shared, sold, transferred, or provided to any third party. You are responsible for safeguarding your account credentials, and you assume full responsibility for all activities carried out under your account, regardless of whether you authorized them.
agreement.section4: You agree not to engage in, assist, or participate in any behaviour that may harm or disrupt the platform, including but not limited to hacking, exploiting vulnerabilities, bypassing security systems, using bots or automated scripts, engaging in fraudulent transactions, or any other illegal activity. Violations may result in immediate account suspension and potential legal action.
agreement.section5: You understand and accept that all transactional records—including deposits, withdrawals, credit conversions, reward calculations, and activity logs—are based on the platform’s final system data. In cases of system failure, network delays, abnormal transactions, or operational errors, the platform has the right to adjust, correct, or revoke records as deemed necessary.
agreement.section6: The platform may update, modify, or replace any part of this Agreement at any time based on legal, operational, or policy needs. All updates take effect immediately upon publication. You are responsible for reviewing the latest version of the Agreement. Continuing to use the platform signifies your acceptance of any updates.
agreement.section7: In the event of disputes—whether related to transactions, account issues, rewards, security, or service content—the platform reserves the right to interpret, investigate, and make the final decision. If you disagree with the outcome, you may submit an appeal, but the platform retains sole authority to determine whether to process it.
agreement.section8: If any part of this Agreement is deemed invalid, illegal, or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain fully valid and binding. By continuing to use the platform, you unconditionally accept all valid terms of this Agreement.
agreement.section9: The platform complies with applicable data protection laws and is committed to safeguarding your personal information, including registration data, transaction records, and sensitive information. While the platform will apply reasonable security measures, it cannot guarantee protection from unauthorized attacks, network failures, or uncontrollable incidents.
agreement.section10: You acknowledge and accept the inherent risks of using online services, including network instability, system maintenance, API failures, delayed responses, or account anomalies. The platform will strive to provide stable service but cannot guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.
agreement.section11: You confirm that you are above the legal minimum age (18 years old or the age defined by your local law) to register and use this platform. The platform may request identity verification at any time. If a minor is found using the platform, the account will be terminated immediately.
agreement.section12: You must not use the platform for unlawful purposes, including money laundering, fraud, identity theft, payment abuse, publishing illegal content, or any activity prohibited by law. Suspicious activities may be reported to relevant authorities in compliance with legal obligations.
agreement.section13: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your device, including preventing malware, viruses, unauthorized access, and Wi-Fi interference. If your device is compromised, resulting in account loss or data leakage, the platform is not liable.
agreement.section14: The platform may send you notifications through system messages, SMS, email, or in-app alerts regarding updates, reminders, risk warnings, or promotional information. These communications are considered official notices once sent.
agreement.section15: You agree that platform maintenance, upgrades, or modifications may temporarily interrupt services. Such interruptions do not constitute a breach of service agreement.
agreement.section16: This Agreement represents the complete and final understanding between you and the platform regarding the use of our services and supersedes any prior verbal or written statements. Continued use of the platform indicates that you fully understand and accept all terms in this Agreement.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.desc: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when registering, using our services, or interacting with the platform. This includes, but is not limited to, your name, contact information, account details, device data, usage records, and communication logs. We may also record system activities such as IP addresses, access times, browser types, and device identifiers to ensure service stability and enhance user safety.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.desc: Your information is used to create and maintain your account, process transactions, provide customer support, and ensure compliance with legal and regulatory requirements. We may analyze usage behaviors to improve service performance, personalize your experience, prevent fraud, and enhance the overall stability of the platform. Your information may also be used for security monitoring and verification to protect both you and the system.

section3.title: 3. Data Protection and Security
section3.desc: We adopt industry-standard security measures, including encryption, access controls, and continuous monitoring, to safeguard your personal data against unauthorized access, disclosure, loss, or misuse. Although we implement comprehensive measures to secure your data, no Internet transmission or storage system is completely risk-free. Therefore, we encourage you to maintain strong password hygiene and monitor your account activity.

section4.title: 4. Sharing and Disclosure of Information
section4.desc: We do not sell or trade your personal information. Your data may only be shared with trusted partners or service providers who are essential for operating the platform—such as payment processors, identity verification services, and technical infrastructure providers. All third parties are required to follow strict confidentiality and data protection obligations. We may also disclose information when legally required to comply with investigations, court orders, or regulatory authorities.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights and Choices
section5.desc: You have the right to access, correct, or update your personal data at any time. Where permitted by law, you may request deletion of your information, restrict certain processing activities, or withdraw consent previously granted. If you choose to delete or limit certain information, some services may become unavailable. Please contact us through customer support if you wish to exercise any data-related rights or have concerns about your privacy.

section1.title: 1. Frequently Asked Questions
section1.desc: Here you can quickly find answers to the most common questions, including account registration, deposits, withdrawals, and game-related information. This section helps you resolve most basic issues on your own without contacting customer service, improving overall efficiency.

section2.title: 2. Deposit Assistance
section2.desc: This section provides a complete deposit guide, including step-by-step instructions, common failure reasons, troubleshooting methods, and estimated processing times for different payment methods. We also include suggestions to help you avoid failed deposits and ensure every transaction goes smoothly.

section3.title: 3. Withdrawal Assistance
section3.desc: Learn about the withdrawal application process, review requirements, average processing times, and common delay reasons. This section helps you submit withdrawal requests correctly and provides necessary troubleshooting steps to ensure your funds are processed safely and promptly.

section4.title: 4. Account & Security
section4.desc: This section covers how to manage account details, update personal information, reset your password, and enable security features. We also provide multiple security tips, such as avoiding scams, protecting login information, and identifying suspicious activity to keep your account safe.

section5.title: 5. Contact Support
section5.desc: If you need further assistance, our support team is always ready to help. You can reach us through live chat, email, or messaging apps. Whether it’s a technical issue, account verification, or an urgent matter, we will respond as quickly as possible.
